questions.objective_ref: Identify three common reasons an Anthropic API call can fail (authentication, rate limit, network)
Name the SDK exception hierarchy (AnthropicError → APIError → specific classes)
Write a try/except block that catches AuthenticationError and RateLimitError separately
Distinguish the correct response for each exception type: fix credentials for AuthenticationError
Implement a basic retry loop for RateLimitError using time.sleep()
Describe what BadRequestError and APIConnectionError indicate and the correct response to each
